prestazioni: AMG M158 6.0L V12 biturbo (engine code: M275 E60 AL) upgraded with a bespoke Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ hybrid turbo system featuring Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with titanium-aluminide turbine wheels, custom 1.25 A/R turbine housings, and billet compressor wheels for 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) boost, paired with a Weistec titanium downpipe and 3.5-inch Inconel exhaust manifold wrap to reduce thermal soak by 30%

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone engine management with custom Pagani-Hermes-specific fuel and ignition maps, including a secondary fuel pump system (Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow pumps) and ID1700x injectors for E85 compatibility, alongside a custom dry-sump oil system with an additional 4-liter capacity and a Setrab 10-row oil cooler with dual SPAL 16-inch fans

Pagani-specific Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), paired with a custom titanium anti-roll bar kit (front: 24mm adjustable, rear: 22mm adjustable) and spherical bearing suspension mounts from SuperPro, along with a Pagani-approved AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake kit with 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors and Pagani-specific Hermes Edition gold-anodized calipers
estetica: Custom Hermes Edition Pagani Huayra body kit featuring a full carbon-fiber widebody conversion by Novitec Torado, including extended front fenders with integrated LED turn signals, a revised rear diffuser with active aerodynamics (adjustable Gurney flaps), and a bespoke front splitter with a 3D-printed titanium support structure for 20% more downforce at 250 km/h

Exclusive Hermes x Pagani co-branded interior with hand-stitched Hermès leather (Epsom grain) on the dashboard, door cards, and custom Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon-fiber shells with Alcantara inserts), paired with a bespoke titanium shift knob (CN-machined from aerospace-grade Ti-6Al-4V) and a Pagani-Hermes Edition analog gauge cluster with 24k gold-plated bezels

Full titanium exhaust system by Capristo, featuring a 4.5-inch dual-exit setup with carbon-fiber tips and a bespoke sound tuning valve system (electronically controlled via the Motec ECU) for three distinct exhaust notes: 'Hermes Silent' (valves closed, 85 dB), 'Sport' (valves 50% open, 95 dB), and 'Track' (valves fully open, 110 dB), with a custom titanium heat shield wrapped in Hermès leather for the center console
